title: Cinematic and Web Funnel Engine — intake/budget-authorization.json (Skill 62, U9)
description: The client-stated maximum media-generation spend and premium-model permission captured during intake (spec Section 8.1 group 11 / Section 8.2 intake/budget-authorization.json). This is the CLIENT'S REQUEST captured at intake time, not the P5 spend approval itself — approved/approved_by/approved_at are filled in later by the P5 budget-approval phase (a later build unit) reading this file, never by intake_engine.py, so intake can never self-approve its own spend.
